notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-301 — a BIG catch-up, thanks for your patience! Since your last update: ⭐ the Instant Reports sidebar is now GROUPED — a pinned 'Start your day' trio (Market Today · Top 20 · Smart Money) plus collapsible families (Today's action / Building quietly / Composite); tap a heading to fold it, your choice is remembered (drag-reorder is paused in this layout — tell me if you miss it). 🤖 AUTO-PILOT (PRACTICE): opt-in inside 📋 My trading rules — it makes practice buys by YOUR rules once per fresh data day, with a decision diary explaining every buy and skip. 🎯 MY PICKS: name a share and your own buy/sell/stop prices — placed as practice limit orders; 💵 set your own $ per buy and per-pick Invest $; 🔁 tick repeat to cycle a pick (buy → sell at 🎯 → buy again), with an anti-churn pause if a cycle stops out. 🖥 FULL SCREEN on every report window (Esc restores). Plus: search narrows the report you're viewing, stronger password hashing (silent upgrade on login), the 💧 liquidity floor defaults to ≥$50k/day on fresh installs (one tap off, remembered), fixed ownership links, and speed work under the hood. PLEASE TEST: the grouped sidebar (love/hate?), auto-pilot with a pick + repeat on practice money, and 🖥 full screen on a report. Everything auto-pilot does is practice-only — it cannot touch real money. Feedback via ✉ top-left!
